name: Pilbara Minerals Limited
content: Pilbara Minerals is the leading ASX-listed pure-play lithium company. It owns and operates the world-class Pilgangoora Operation in Western Australia, one of the largest independent hard-rock lithium deposits globally. Pilbara Minerals is strategically expanding its production capacity and moving downstream through joint ventures for lithium chemical conversion, positioning itself as a major long-term partner for the global battery supply chain.
